_metadata.description: PMWiki → Quarto conversion agent for Math 119 course site. Converts pmwiki_data/ to a Quarto website deployed to GitHub Pages via GitHub Actions.
_metadata.usage: See pmwiki_quarto.md for narrative guide. Implementation in tools/pmwiki_to_quarto.py.

agent_details.description: Converts PMWiki flat files to a Quarto GitHub Pages site, handling Math 119 course markup idioms including LaTeX, toggle blocks, and image attachments.

agent_type.description: LLM agent orchestrating a sequential conversion pipeline: sync → decode → convert → scaffold → publish. The LLM handles ambiguous markup decisions, site structure planning, and proposes before writing files. All file I/O and markup transformation is done via tools.

llm_agent.system_prompt:
You are an expert on PMWiki markup conversion and Quarto static site generation. You help convert Math 119 course content from PMWiki flat files to a Quarto website deployed to GitHub Pages.

Your expertise:
- PMWiki flat file format and URL-encoding
- PmWiki markup rules (headers, lists, links, divs, conditionals)
- Quarto project structure, _quarto.yml, QMD format, MathJax/KaTeX
- GitHub Actions publish workflows using quarto-dev/quarto-actions
- Math 119 course structure (36 class sessions, definitions, flex days)

CRITICAL RULES:
1. Always extract and placeholder-replace math regions before applying any other markup rules.
2. Apply markup rules in the order listed in pmwiki_quarto.json → conversion_pipeline.rule_order.
3. Never modify pmwiki_data/ — it is read-only source data.
4. For toggle blocks (>>toggle<<), use <details><summary>Answers</summary>...</details>.
5. Skip (:if false:)...(:if:) blocks entirely.
6. Sort Class.* pages numerically (integer suffix), not lexicographically.
7. Resolve Attach: image paths by looking up uploads/[GroupName]/filename.

Propose structure changes before writing files. Execute conversion after approval.

tools.name: decode_pmwiki_file
tools.description: Reads a PMWiki flat file from pmwiki_data/wiki.d/ and extracts the URL-decoded page text from the 'text=' field. Returns the plain decoded text and page metadata (name, mtime, rev). Must be called before any conversion. Skips diff sections that follow the text field.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the PMWiki flat file. Example: '/Users/chazclar/Documents/GitHub/m119_master/pmwiki_data/wiki.d/Class.1'

tools.name: convert_pmwiki_to_qmd
tools.description: Converts decoded PmWiki markup text to Quarto QMD content. Applies markup rules in strict order: (1) extract math placeholders, (2) strip :if false: blocks, (3) apply block rules (toggles, notes, divs), (4) apply inline rules (headers, lists, links, images), (5) restore math placeholders. Returns QMD string with YAML frontmatter.

pmwiki_text.description: URL-decoded PmWiki page text extracted from the text= field.

page_name.description: PMWiki page name in Group.Name format. Example: 'Class.1', 'Definition.Logarithm'

output_path.description: Relative output path within site/ for the generated QMD file. Example: 'class/class-1.qmd'

link_registry.description: Map of PMWiki page names to their output QMD paths, used to resolve internal links. Example: {"Class.5": "class/class-5.qmd"}

input_examples.pmwiki_text:
!! Brain Gains
1. Let $f(x) = x^2$. Find $f(3)$.
(:note:)
>>toggle<<
Answers
# $f(3) = 9$
>><<
(:noteend:)

tools.name: setup_quarto_project
tools.description: Scaffolds the Quarto project in site/: writes _quarto.yml from the template, creates folder structure (class/, definitions/, assets/uploads/), and generates index.qmd from Main.HomePage. Safe to re-run — only overwrites _quarto.yml and index.qmd, never deletes existing QMD files.

site_dir.description: Absolute path to the site output directory. Default: project_root/site/

site_title.description: Site title for _quarto.yml. Example: 'Math 119 — Calculus I'

github_repo.description: GitHub repo in owner/name format for site URL generation. Example: 'chazclar/m119'

tools.name: build_navigation
tools.description: Generates the sidebar navigation structure for _quarto.yml from the list of converted pages. Class.* pages are sorted numerically and grouped under 'Class Sessions'. Definition.* pages are grouped under 'Definitions'. Returns a YAML-ready navigation structure.

converted_pages.description: List of PMWiki page names that were successfully converted. Example: ['Class.1', 'Class.2', 'Definition.Logarithm']

link_registry.description: Map of page names to output QMD paths.

tools.name: copy_uploads
tools.description: Copies all files from pmwiki_data/uploads/ to site/assets/uploads/, preserving the group subdirectory structure (Class/, Main/, Schedule/). Skips files already present with matching size. Returns a list of copied files.

tools.name: write_github_actions_workflow
tools.description: Writes .github/workflows/publish.yml using the quarto-dev/quarto-actions/publish@v2 action targeting the gh-pages branch. Only writes if the file does not exist or --force is passed, to avoid overwriting manual customizations.

project_root.description: Absolute path to the repository root.

force.description: Overwrite existing workflow file. Default: false.

conversion_pipeline.description: Ordered steps for converting a single PMWiki page. Step order is mandatory — do not reorder.

step_detail.1_extract_math: Replace all $...$ and $$...$$ and \begin{...}...\end{...} with MATH_INLINE_N / MATH_BLOCK_N placeholders. Store originals in a dict keyed by placeholder.
step_detail.2_strip_if_false: Match and discard content between (:if false:) and (:if:) tags.
step_detail.3_block_rules: Apply block-level rules in order: toggle_div, note_block, indent_div, comment_div, attachlist.
step_detail.4_inline_rules: Apply inline rules in order: newwin_link, internal_link, plain_link, attach_image_sized, attach_image, alpha_list, ordered_list, unordered_list, h1, h2, h3, bold, italic, arrow_indent.
step_detail.5_restore_math: Replace all MATH_INLINE_N and MATH_BLOCK_N placeholders with original LaTeX.

markup_rules.description: PmWiki markup → QMD/HTML translation rules. Apply in the order listed within each rule group.

block_rules.name: strip_if_false
block_rules.notes: Apply before all other rules. Non-greedy multiline match.

block_rules.name: toggle_div
block_rules.notes: inner content is already converted. Apply block rules to inner content recursively before wrapping.

block_rules.name: indent_div
block_rules.notes: Prefix each line of inner with '> '

block_rules.name: comment_div
block_rules.description: Instructor-only comment block (visible in wiki editing, not rendered to students)
block_rules.notes: Drop comment blocks entirely — they were visible only to wiki editors.

block_rules.name: attachlist
block_rules.qmd_replacement: <!-- attachlist: replaced by static file list during conversion -->
block_rules.notes: Replace with HTML comment; converter replaces with actual file listing.

inline_rules.name: newwin_link
inline_rules.description: External link opening in new window

inline_rules.name: newwin_link_same
inline_rules.description: New window link with same text as URL
inline_rules.notes: Fallback when -> form is not present.

inline_rules.name: internal_link_aliased
inline_rules.description: Internal wiki link with display text
inline_rules.notes: Resolve target via link_registry. Omit anchor if present.

inline_rules.name: internal_link_bare
inline_rules.description: Internal wiki link using page name as text

inline_rules.name: attach_image_sized
inline_rules.notes: Group inferred from current page group.

inline_rules.name: attach_image
inline_rules.notes: group = current page group (e.g., 'Class' for Class.1 pages).

inline_rules.name: alpha_list_item
inline_rules.notes:
Consecutive alpha list items are wrapped in
    ...
by a post-pass.

inline_rules.name: ordered_list
inline_rules.notes: Must run after alpha_list_item. Handles multi-level ## with indentation.

folders.class/: One QMD per class session (class-1.qmd through class-36.qmd)
folders.assets/notes/: Additional instructor notes and board photos (manual addition)

root_files.styles.css: Custom CSS for .indent class and any PMWiki-specific styling

quarto_yml_template.notes: Replace __CLASS_MENU__, __DEFINITIONS_MENU__, __SIDEBAR_CONTENTS__ with generated nav from build_navigation(). html-math-method: mathjax is required for LaTeX rendering.

github_actions_template.notes: Run 'cd site && quarto publish gh-pages' locally once to create the gh-pages branch before the first Actions run.

inputs.uploads_dir: pmwiki_data/uploads/ — images and attachments by group subfolder
inputs.env_vars: None required for conversion (SFTP vars only needed for pull_wiki.py)

system: quarto>=1.4 (CLI — install from quarto.org, not pip)
github: GitHub repo with Pages enabled (Settings → Pages → Source: Deploy from branch gh-pages)
GITHUB_TOKEN secret (automatic for public repos, set explicitly for private)

known_failures.cause: A >>toggle<< block containing another >>toggle<< block — the outer regex closes on the inner >><<
known_failures.fallback: Log a warning and emit the raw block as a code fence for manual review

known_failures.cause: PMWiki page references an image that was never uploaded or was uploaded to a different group
known_failures.fallback: Emit the img tag with a broken-image CSS class and log the missing file for manual review

known_failures.error: Unicode decode error on flat file
known_failures.cause: A small number of PMWiki files may have non-UTF-8 bytes despite charset=UTF-8 declaration
known_failures.fallback: Decode with errors='replace' and log the affected page name

fallbacks.quarto_cli_missing: Emit a clear error: 'Install Quarto from https://quarto.org before running conversion.' Do not proceed.
fallbacks.pmwiki_data_empty: Emit a clear error: 'Run uv run pull_wiki.py first to sync pmwiki_data/.' Do not proceed.
fallbacks.gh_pages_branch_missing: Emit instructions: 'Run: cd site && quarto publish gh-pages (one time only to initialize branch).'

test_cases.name: Math preserved through list rules
test_cases.notes: Math inside alpha list items must not be altered

test_cases.name: Piecewise math block preserved
test_cases.notes: Multi-line display math must survive conversion untouched

quality_checks: No raw >> or << sequences in any output QMD file
No (:...:) directive sequences in any output QMD
No Attach: references in any output QMD
No %25 sequences remaining in any output QMD
All Class.N pages present (verify count matches wiki.d Class.* count)
quarto check passes in site/ directory
No MathJax console errors on quarto preview

operational_guidance.when_to_use: Run the full conversion pipeline after any pull_wiki.py sync that downloads new or changed Class.* pages. For minor edits, convert just the changed page using --page flag.
operational_guidance.when_not_to_use: Do not run conversion if pmwiki_data/wiki.d/ is empty — pull first.
best_practices: Always preview locally with 'quarto preview' before pushing to main
Commit _quarto.yml and all QMD source files but gitignore _site/
Add board photos and class notes to site/assets/notes/ manually with meaningful filenames

related_agents.name: canvas_content_sync
related_agents.relationship: Complementary — Canvas is student delivery platform; Quarto site is open reference. Content flows from PMWiki → Quarto site, independently from Canvas.
